note: Crafts of the Somatic Reaches/Cogitarium (body_mind axis). Soma is the body-pole tradition (the physical masteries, the body as instrument); Noesis the mind-pole (mental disciplines, memory-palaces, thought as force). Learned by traveling the Reach or training with Somatics/Cogitants. Both drift the wielder toward their pole; the perfected athlete-scholar is where they co-fire, the disembodied Cogitant where mind wins absolutely. axes signed for engine compat. Authored by Aevi (PO), SNG-016 — the last of the six near-axis traditions.

abilities.name: Soma
abilities.narrationHints: The body made instrument — breath, poise, endurance past what should be possible, movement as a language spoken without words.
abilities.description: The body-pole mastery: breath-control, endurance, poise, the physical self honed to an instrument. The Flesh-Temples' art.
abilities.notFor: Thought-work or memory (that's Noesis); brute force alone (Soma is control, not just strength); anything requiring you to leave the body behind.

tree.name: The Trained Body
tree.grants: Endurance and poise past the ordinary; control breath and heartbeat to steady fear, pain, or cold; move with a precision that reads as grace.
tree.cannot: The body still has limits; Soma raises the ceiling, it doesn't remove it.

tree.name: The Instrument
tree.grants: Feats of body that look impossible — hold a bridge-pose an hour, run past collapse, slow your own bleeding, take a blow and keep the form; teach the body a skill in days that takes others years.
tree.cannot: Pushing past the true limit still breaks you; the body remembers what you spend.

tree.name: The Perfected Vessel
tree.grants: The body as a mastered whole — survive what kills others, perform at the edge of the humanly possible, make the physical self answer the will completely. The Flesh-Temples' power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts body-hot — and the Temple that rejects thought forgets to warn itself; a perfected body with a starved mind is its own foreclosure, mastery with nothing left to aim it.

abilities.name: Noesis
abilities.narrationHints: Thought made a discipline and a force — memory-palaces, absolute focus, reasoning that outruns the room, the mind holding what the body can't.
abilities.description: The mind-pole mastery: memory, focus, reason, thought as an instrument sharp enough to act on the world. The Cogitarium's art.
abilities.notFor: Physical feats (that's Soma); wisdom (Noesis is sharp, not necessarily wise); anything requiring presence in the body it keeps trying to leave.

tree.name: The Ordered Mind
tree.grants: Perfect recall of what you attend to; focus that ignores pain, fear, and distraction; reason a problem faster and further than the unpracticed.
tree.cannot: Recall is not understanding; focus this tight can miss the body's warnings.

tree.name: The Memory-Palace
tree.grants: Hold vast structured knowledge and retrieve it instantly; model a system or a person in your head and predict them; think through a crisis in the space others panic in.
tree.cannot: The model is only as good as its inputs; a mind that lives in the model loses the room.

tree.name: The Cogitant's Height
tree.grants: Thought as force — solve the unsolvable, hold a hundred threads at once, out-think a situation so completely you seem to move before it does. The Cogitarium's power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts mind-hot, toward leaving the body behind as the Cogitants have — and a mind that abandons its body abandons the world it was for; the coldest foreclosure, thought that has forgotten it was ever meant to be lived.

abilities.name: Body-Read
abilities.narrationHints: A person's health, strength, and hurt read from how they stand.
abilities.description: Read a body — its condition, hidden injury, strength, exhaustion, tells.

tree.name: Body-Read
tree.grants: Read another's physical condition, hidden hurts, and capacities at a glance.
tree.cannot: Body, not mind; the trained conceal tells.

tree.name: The Whole Tell
tree.grants: Read the whole body at once — weight, breath, the held shoulder, what the hands are doing when the face is busy lying.
tree.cannot: It reads the body's report. A trained body reports what its owner chooses.

tree.name: The Body Cannot Lie
tree.grants: Nothing a body does escapes you. Pain, intent, love, the decision made a half-second before it is acted on.
tree.cannot: You cannot stop reading. The Somatics say knowing every body in a room is its own kind of loneliness.

abilities.name: Cold-Read
abilities.narrationHints: The turn of a mind inferred from a hundred small signs.
abilities.description: Infer another's thoughts and intent from micro-signals — not magic, mastery of tells.

tree.name: Cold-Read
tree.grants: Deduce a person's likely thoughts and next move from their signals.
tree.cannot: Inference, not certainty; masters and non-humans resist.

tree.name: The Cold Line
tree.grants: Follow a mind's reasoning as it happens — where it is going, what it has already ruled out.
tree.cannot: You follow the reasoning, not the reasons. A mind moving on feeling is opaque to a cold line.

tree.name: The Open Book
tree.grants: A mind at rest is legible to you — its shape, its habits, the thing it keeps returning to.
tree.cannot: The Cogitants consider unbidden reading a violence, and they are right, and they do it anyway.

abilities.name: Second Wind
abilities.narrationHints: Past the wall, and the body finds more.
abilities.description: Push the body past exhaustion, pain, or shock for a burst — folk-Soma.

tree.name: Second Wind
tree.grants: Ignore pain, fatigue, or shock for a short, decisive burst of physical effort.
tree.cannot: The body remembers the debt; overuse breaks you.

tree.name: The Third Wind
tree.grants: Find breath and strength past where the body had none — twice, in one day, at a cost.
tree.cannot: The body is borrowing from tomorrow, and tomorrow collects with interest.

tree.name: The Wind That Doesn't End
tree.grants: Go on past exhaustion for as long as the thing needs doing — the body simply does not stop.
tree.cannot: It does not stop, but it does break. Somatics who lean on this die young and know it.

abilities.name: Total Focus
abilities.narrationHints: The world narrows to the one thing, and nothing reaches you.
abilities.description: Enter absolute focus — ignore fear, distraction, and pain to think or work clean. Folk-Noesis.

tree.name: Total Focus
tree.grants: Focus so completely that fear, pain, and distraction fall away while you think or work.
tree.cannot: Can miss the body's warnings; tight focus narrows the view.

tree.name: The Narrowed World
tree.grants: Narrow to one thing so completely that fear, pain, and noise stop reaching you.
tree.cannot: What you narrow out is still happening. People have been focused to death.

abilities.name: Perfect Motion
abilities.narrationHints: The body does exactly and only what's needed, flawlessly.
abilities.description: Execute a physical feat with impossible precision and economy — mid-tier Soma.
abilities.notFor: Feats past the body's true ceiling; thought-work.

tree.name: Perfect Motion
tree.grants: Perform a physical act at the very edge of the possible — balance, speed, precision, control.
tree.cannot: The true limit still holds; costs the body dearly.

tree.name: The Unwasted Motion
tree.grants: No motion you make is wasted — every step, block, and reach does exactly and only what it must.
tree.cannot: Efficiency is not power. A perfect motion still loses to a stronger one.

tree.name: Motion Without Thought
tree.grants: The body acts correctly before the mind knows there was a decision — and it is right.
tree.cannot: The body chooses. If you have trained it badly, it will do that beautifully.

abilities.name: Memory-Palace
abilities.narrationHints: Vast knowledge held in a built inner architecture, retrieved instantly.
abilities.description: Hold and instantly retrieve vast structured knowledge; model a person or system in the mind — mid-tier Noesis.
abilities.notFor: Wisdom; presence in the body it forgets.

tree.name: Memory-Palace
tree.grants: Store and recall huge structured knowledge; model and predict a system or person in your head.
tree.cannot: Only as good as its inputs; living in the model loses the room.

tree.name: The Deeper Rooms
tree.grants: Store not just facts but experiences whole — walk back into a conversation and hear it again exactly.
tree.cannot: What you store, you keep. Including what you would rather have let fade.

tree.name: The Palace Entire
tree.grants: Nothing you have attended to is lost. The whole of your life is a place you can walk through.
tree.cannot: The Cogitants who build the deepest palaces have trouble leaving them.

abilities.name: The Whole Act
abilities.narrationHints: Thought and motion stop being two things.
abilities.description: The braid-craft: body and mind as one instrument, acting faster than either could decide — the Middle Way's ideal.
abilities.notFor: Body-heavy or mind-heavy wielders (needs both near-equal); the extremes.

tree.name: The Whole Act
tree.grants: Act with body and mind fused — perception, decision, and motion as a single instant.
tree.cannot: Needs both trained near-equal; the pure poles cannot do it.

abilities.name: The Pathless Way
abilities.narrationHints: The unclimbable is climbed, the uncrossable crossed — the body finds a way where there is none.
abilities.description: The traversal capstone: cross terrain that stops everyone else — sheer faces, killing cold, drowning fords, the deep dark — by mastery of the body pushed past every ordinary limit.
abilities.notFor: Teleportation or flight (it's mastery, not magic); carrying others easily; ignoring true lethality unwarned.

tree.name: The Pathless Way
tree.grants: Cross the uncrossable — any natural barrier yields to enough skill, breath, and will; lead a party through what would kill them alone.
tree.cannot: The truly impossible (a sheer mile of ice in a storm) still exacts a price; you can fail, spectacularly, and the fall is real.

abilities.name: Skydancer
abilities.narrationHints: The body treats the air like ground — a leap becomes a bound becomes something the earth stopped being able to stop.
abilities.description: Flight-by-mastery: prodigious leaps, wall-runs, glides, and air-steps that keep you aloft in bursts. Not true hovering — a body so trained the air briefly holds it. Cross rooftops, chasms, close on a fleeing foe from above.
abilities.notFor: Sustained hovering or true flight (it's bursts, momentum-bound); carrying heavy loads aloft.

tree.name: Skydancer
tree.grants: Move through the air in bounds, glides, and wall-runs — cross gaps, scale heights, drop on a target.
tree.cannot: Momentum-bound (you must keep moving, no hover); a mistimed step falls; heavy burden grounds you.
